After a challenging and humbling job search, I’m excited to share that I’ve accepted a position as Senior Cybersecurity Governance & Compliance Lead with a Texas water utility company. This journey reinforced several lessons that I’ll carry forward throughout &nbsp;&nbsp; LinkedIn
